{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Reinsurance Officer",
  "description": "Coronation is a leading financial service partner that helps build enduring legacies for sustainable wealth creation in Africa. Having established a 30-year record of achievements in banking across Africa and beyond, our founders established a Pan-African platform focused on building a better financial future for Africa. Today, our businesses are entrusted with our over $1billion of clients&rsquo; assets and are recognized as Nigeria&#39;s fastest-growing investment managers. Our purpose at Coronation is to create a prosperous future for our clients and the African continent. Coronation is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We enable an inclusive workplace by identity, disability, and other statuses protected by law.

Coronation Insurance Plc&ndash; an affiliated company to Coronation Group Ltd - is a leading insurance provider of a diverse range of products and services covering general and special risk businesses to individuals and corporate entities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Reinsurance Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full time

Principal Duties &amp; Responsibilities


	Apply organisational policies and procedures for processing a new application, renewal, cancellation and/or an alteration to an existing risk for the class of business being underwritten
	Participate in negotiation with reinsurance partners to derive competitive reinsurance arrangement
	Monitor company&rsquo;s portfolios to ensure adequacy of reinsurance against regulatory requirements
	Provide support on reinsurance system improvements through user acceptance testing
	Conduct analysis, improvement, and timely generation of assigned reporting for reinsurance billing, collection, and reinsurance notification activities
	Ensure reinsurance arrangements are carried out in accordance with company&rsquo;s reinsurance policies and regulatory requirements
	Review monthly account and collateral materials for a portfolio of reinsurance arrangements, ensuring a robust control framework and audit trail process is adhered to
	Implement and manage an optimum reinsurance framework for new and existing products and standalone facilities for all geographies
	Provide actuarial support by familiarizing with actuarial procedures and requirements of the company and/or assigned business lines


Requirements
Educational Qualification and Work Experience:


	Degree in Accounting, Insurance or related discipline.
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in similar role
	CIIN membership is a key requirement


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Able to identify indicators of compliance of reinsurance activities against reinsurance policies
	Able to negotiate with reinsurance partners to derive competitive reinsurance arrangement
	Able to monitor reinsurance activities effectively
	Able to provide accurate details on reinsurance status of the company from time to time.
	Able to identify and analyze factors affecting reinsurance arrangement
	Able to develop reinsurance objectives from company&rsquo;s risk exposure policies
	Able to establish reinsurance policies for individual business lines
	Knowledge of standard policy wordings, extensions, and limitations
	Experience in managing, structuring and purchasing reinsurance treaty
	Ability to manage large workloads and tight deadlines
	Knowledge of IFRS 17
	Able to apply advanced mathematical / actuarial concepts and techniques
	Skilled in using Microsoft Excel and core insurance software


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications and CVs to: careers@coronationinsurance.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-25",

Reinsurance Officer Job at Coronation Insurance Plc




        
    

        
        Coronation is a leading financial service partner that helps build enduring legacies for sustainable wealth creation in Africa. Having established a 30-year record of achievements in banking across Africa and beyond, our founders established a Pan-African platform focused on building a better financial future for Africa. Today, our businesses are entrusted with our over $1billion of clients’ assets and are recognized as Nigeria's fastest-growing investment managers. Our purpose at Coronation is to create a prosperous future for our clients and the African continent. Coronation is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We enable an inclusive workplace by identity, disability, and other statuses protected by law.
     

            
    



Coronation Insurance Plc– an affiliated company to Coronation Group Ltd - is a leading insurance provider of a diverse range of products and services covering general and special risk businesses to individuals and corporate entities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Reinsurance Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full time

Principal Duties & Responsibilities


	Apply organisational policies and procedures for processing a new application, renewal, cancellation and/or an alteration to an existing risk for the class of business being underwritten
	Participate in negotiation with reinsurance partners to derive competitive reinsurance arrangement
	Monitor company’s portfolios to ensure adequacy of reinsurance against regulatory requirements
	Provide support on reinsurance system improvements through user acceptance testing
	Conduct analysis, improvement, and timely generation of assigned reporting for reinsurance billing, collection, and reinsurance notification activities
	Ensure reinsurance arrangements are carried out in accordance with company’s reinsurance policies and regulatory requirements
	Review monthly account and collateral materials for a portfolio of reinsurance arrangements, ensuring a robust control framework and audit trail process is adhered to
	Implement and manage an optimum reinsurance framework for new and existing products and standalone facilities for all geographies
	Provide actuarial support by familiarizing with actuarial procedures and requirements of the company and/or assigned business lines


Requirements
Educational Qualification and Work Experience:


	Degree in Accounting, Insurance or related discipline.
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in similar role
	CIIN membership is a key requirement


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Able to identify indicators of compliance of reinsurance activities against reinsurance policies
	Able to negotiate with reinsurance partners to derive competitive reinsurance arrangement
	Able to monitor reinsurance activities effectively
	Able to provide accurate details on reinsurance status of the company from time to time.
	Able to identify and analyze factors affecting reinsurance arrangement
	Able to develop reinsurance objectives from company’s risk exposure policies
	Able to establish reinsurance policies for individual business lines
	Knowledge of standard policy wordings, extensions, and limitations
	Experience in managing, structuring and purchasing reinsurance treaty
	Ability to manage large workloads and tight deadlines
	Knowledge of IFRS 17
	Able to apply advanced mathematical / actuarial concepts and techniques
	Skilled in using Microsoft Excel and core insurance software


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications and CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Human Resources Manager",
  "description": "Opes Venit is a private equity fund focused on investing globally in Education, health, Retail, food &amp; Beverages, Energy &amp; Sustainability, technology and Real Estate.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Manager

Job Location: Lagos

The Role


	Are you a strategic HR professional who believes that a happy workplace is a productive one? We are seeking a Human Resources Manager to oversee HR operations for the entire Opes Venit portfolio.
	In this role, you won&rsquo;t just be managing processes&mdash;you will be shaping the employee experience. You will be the architect of our talent strategy, driving recruitment, talent development, performance management, and employee engagement from the ground up.


Key Responsibilities


	Talent Acquisition: Lead the end-to-end recruitment process for all brands, sourcing top-tier talent that aligns with our core values and growth objectives.
	Talent Development: Design and implement learning and development initiatives to help our team members grow, upskill, and reach their full potential.
	Performance Management: Build and oversee a fair, transparent, and growth-oriented performance review system that motivates employees and aligns with business goals.
	Employee Engagement &amp; Culture: Be the heartbeat of our workplace. Develop creative initiatives, feedback loops, and team-building strategies to ensure a happy, inclusive, and highly engaged workforce.
	Multi-Brand HR Alignment: Act as a central HR partner, ensuring consistent, high-quality HR practices and culture across all brands under the Opes Venit umbrella.


Requirements
What We Are Looking For:


	Experience: 5+ years of progressive HR experience, preferably managing HR for multiple brands, a holding company, or a fast-paced environment.
	The Culture Champion: A proven track record of creating a happy, collaborative, and thriving workplace culture.
	The Talent Magnet: Strong recruitment skills with a knack for spotting potential and cultural fit.
	Strategic &amp; Empathetic: A unique blend of strong business acumen and exceptional emotional intelligence.
	Communication: Excellent interpersonal and communication skills to effectively connect with diverse teams across different brands.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: HR@Opesvenit.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Human Resources Manager Job at Opes Venit




        
    

        
        Opes Venit is a private equity fund focused on investing globally in Education, health, Retail, food & Beverages, Energy & Sustainability, technology and Real Estate.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Manager

Job Location: Lagos

The Role
     

            
    




	Are you a strategic HR professional who believes that a happy workplace is a productive one? We are seeking a Human Resources Manager to oversee HR operations for the entire Opes Venit portfolio.
	In this role, you won’t just be managing processes—you will be shaping the employee experience. You will be the architect of our talent strategy, driving recruitment, talent development, performance management, and employee engagement from the ground up.


Key Responsibilities


	Talent Acquisition: Lead the end-to-end recruitment process for all brands, sourcing top-tier talent that aligns with our core values and growth objectives.
	Talent Development: Design and implement learning and development initiatives to help our team members grow, upskill, and reach their full potential.
	Performance Management: Build and oversee a fair, transparent, and growth-oriented performance review system that motivates employees and aligns with business goals.
	Employee Engagement & Culture: Be the heartbeat of our workplace. Develop creative initiatives, feedback loops, and team-building strategies to ensure a happy, inclusive, and highly engaged workforce.
	Multi-Brand HR Alignment: Act as a central HR partner, ensuring consistent, high-quality HR practices and culture across all brands under the Opes Venit umbrella.


Requirements
What We Are Looking For:


	Experience: 5+ years of progressive HR experience, preferably managing HR for multiple brands, a holding company, or a fast-paced environment.
	The Culture Champion: A proven track record of creating a happy, collaborative, and thriving workplace culture.
	The Talent Magnet: Strong recruitment skills with a knack for spotting potential and cultural fit.
	Strategic & Empathetic: A unique blend of strong business acumen and exceptional emotional intelligence.
	Communication: Excellent interpersonal and communication skills to effectively connect with diverse teams across different brands.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Inventory Officer Job at Vibe Lounge




        
    

        
        The Vibe Lounge is a major dual-city premium hospitality brand across Nigeria. It is celebrated for pioneering the "fun-dining" model, which blends premium lunch and dinner service with high-intensity nightlife.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Description


	We are sooking a highly organized and detail oriented Inventary Officer to oversee inventory control processes, maintain accurate stock records, and ensure efficient clock management across all operational departments


Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Maintain accurate inventory records and stock levels
	Receive, inspect, and record incoming goods

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Abuja

Description


	We are looking for a proactive, detail oriented, and experienced
	Preauratint Offficer to mange sourcing, purchasing, and supplier relationships while ensuring cost effective procurement processes that support smooth business operations.


Responsibilities


	Source and purchase food, beverages, and operational supplies
	Manage vendor relationships and negotiate favorable pricing
	Ensure all purchases meet quality standards and company requrem
	Monitor stock levels with the Inventory Officer to prevent shortages
	Track deliveries and resolve supplier-related isues
	Maintain procurement records and documentation


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in a relevant field
	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills
	Good organizational and analytical abilities
	Experience in procurement or purchasing roles
	Proficiency in documentation and reporting
	Hospitality industry experience is an advantage


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: info@thevibelagos.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "title": "Chief Financial Officer (CFO)",
  "description": "The Vibe Lounge is a major dual-city premium hospitality brand across Nigeria. It is celebrated for pioneering the &quot;fun-dining&quot; model, which blends premium lunch and dinner service with high-intensity nightlife.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Financial Officer (CFO)

Job Location: Abuja

Description


	We are looking for a strategic, detail-oriented, and experienced Chief Financial Officer (CFO) to oversee the financial operations of our organization and support sustainable business growth.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement financial strategies and plans
	Preparation of financial reporting and budgeting
	Oversee budgeting and forecasting
	Monitor cash flow and financial performance
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations and company policies
	Provide financial insights to support business decisions
	Manage relationships with banks, auditors, and financial partners


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field
	Strong financial management and analytical skills
	Excellent leadership and decision-making abilities
	Proficiency in financial reporting and budgeting
	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Professional corsifications (ICAN, ACCA, CFA, etc.) are an adied ackantage
	Previous experience in a senior finance role is required.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: info@thevibelagos.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
